title: Leaf Beds
description: Adds primitive beds made out of all the leaves!
body:
# 🍃 Leaf Beds 🛏️

![From left to right: Spruce Leaf Bed, Acacia Leaf Bed with the Minecraft character Sunny lying on it & Mangrove Leaf Bed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eP1ifAcP/images/aaa8a244f7a7b0b751c6f0613f5a0e11720ba8cc.png)

# ✅ Features
- **Crafted** using 3 Leaves and 3 Logs
- **Available for all Leaves**, including Azalea and Flowering Azalea!
- **Sleep** as you would in a normal bed.
- **Support other mods** such as Biome O' Plenty & Pine.

# 🧱 Recipe
![The crafting recipe for an Oak Leaf Bed: 3 Oak Leaves across the middle row, 3 Oak Logs on across the bottom row results in 1 Oak Leaf Bed in the output slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eP1ifAcP/images/42e7cf908f8384a672a6e5995c2a9d5c146d8f08.png)
